channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Three black bags of rubbish dumped on pavement, 21st June
item.description:
See above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Natal Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road resurfacing works, 21st June
item.description:
Hello, with the soon to be ongoing road re-surfacing and pavement works on Burnell Avenue, Lovel Avenue and Norfolk Place. I think it would make sense for Bexley Council to consider resurfacing Bennett Close in it's entirety. Please can you consider this and approve this request as I think it may look odd for surrounding roads to have a new resurface and exclude Bennett Close. Also the road surface in Bennett Close is very old and it makes sense for it to match with the surrounding resurfacing works. Many thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bennett Close, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Adult waste, 21st June
item.description:
This is a bin full of adult nappies that has not been emptied and there's another one in the street full of adult nappies

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garland Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Matress was dumped, 21st June
item.description:
Please remove the large mattress and the other items that have been left behind . Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Gowlett Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Idmiston Road SE27 opposite side of the ro, 21st June
item.description:
Idmiston Road SE27 opposite side of the road to house number 62 (ie diagonally opposite Tulsemere Road junction) number of black plastic sacks of rubbish – content of bags unknown. Picture attached.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Idmiston Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead branches hanging, 21st June
item.description:
Branches seem to have been struck by vehicle.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greencourt Road, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish dumped on pavement, 21st June
item.description:
Large group of black bags and other rubbish dumped on pavement again

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fendyke Road, West Heath, Greater London

item.title: Excessive litter, 21st June
item.description:
There seems to be always litter on Rushmore road between Hilsea street and milfields road. It looks very unpleasant.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Domfe Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Forest Bike, 21st June
item.description:
Encourages flytipping, it’s been here for a while and people are using it as a rubbish bin. Also now started throwing rubbish around it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Paisley Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins, 21st June
item.description:
Please empty litter bins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Five Arches, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 21st June
item.description:
This is at the junction of Barry road and Forest Hill road . Please clear out the fly tipping . Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rockells Place, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead tree and damaged surround church st, 21st June
item.description:
This tree was killed last summer when vandals tried to tip it over. Please replace tree and surround. Could the beds for all adjacent trees be weeded? And something put on top such as wood chips? To stop base of trees looking so messy and overgrown?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left on pavement, 21st June
item.description:
Pots , baskets left on pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsdale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked across pavement., 21st June
item.description:
Obstructing pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brunswick Park, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Oil disposed on pavement/verge of road, 21st June
item.description:
The family that lives in the corner of Hermitage Road and Pytchley Crescent keeps disposing cooking oil into the verge of toad. Now it’s all stained and grass doesn’t grow anymore.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pytchley Crescent, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 27 Redington Road and also Redington Road junction with Redington Gardens, 21st June
item.description:
Severely dehydrated young street trees at both locations

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Redington Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Watering - Young tree not being watered

item.title: Overgrown tree, 21st June
item.description:
The tree is overgrown and means that people have to crouch down to get underneath it. It is just before the entrance to Heversham Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 116, Rydal Drive, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The light has been cut can you please replace it, 21st June
item.description:
Can you please replace the cut street light
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 200c–200d, Chalk Farm Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 15 and 9, 21st June
item.description:
Outside 15 the bottom of tree is so bushy very difficult to get past Outside 9 tree has come loose from stake and Is growing very wrong angle needs straightening asap Already reported both issues 3 weeks ago
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Estelle Road, Gospel Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 21st June
item.description:
